title: Quickdraw Naughty Christmas Elf Costumes and Clothes for Cheeky Badly Behaved Elves (Doctor Outfit – Blue)
features: FUN ELF DRESS-UP WITH MULTIPLE COSTUMES : Choose from reindeer, ballerina, doctor, fireman, police, angel and more – ideal for naughty elves who love to cause festive fun every night in December!
MAKE EVERY MORNING MAGICAL FOR CHILDREN : Kids will love waking up to see which mischievous costume their elf is wearing – a great way to keep the magic of Christmas alive all month long
UNIVERSAL FIT FOR MOST ELF DOLLS : Designed to fit standard-sized naughty elf dolls (around 30cm tall), making it easy to expand your collection of outfits without worrying about compatibility
SOFT, REUSABLE MATERIALS FOR DAILY PLAY : Costumes made from quality fabrics that are soft to touch and durable for repeated use – safe for children and ideal for long-lasting festive traditions
HELPS BUILD CHRISTMAS ANTIC TRADITIONS : Create stories, scenes and surprises using fun elf outfits – perfect for families who want a simple way to build magical moments throughout December
IDEAL FOR GIRLS AND BOYS AGED 3+ YEARS: These elf accessories are suitable for all children – a brilliant advent activity, stocking filler or Christmas eve box treat for imaginative festive play
PLEASE NOTE – ELF DOLL NOT INCLUDED : This listing is for costumes and accessories only; compatible with most popular elf dolls – buy once and reuse for many years of elf-related excitement
description: 🎄 Create Daily Mischief with Your Naughty Elf Bring your festive traditions to life with a fun and ever-changing wardrobe for your mischievous elf doll. With dozens of playful costumes available – including reindeer, ballerina, wizard, police officer, doctor and more – your elf can take on a new look each morning in December. Whether they’re causing chaos or spreading cheer, these outfits make each day magical for children and grown-ups alike. 🎁 A Tradition Families Love Year After Year Kids across the UK wake up excited to discover what their elf has been up to overnight – and a new costume makes the experience even more joyful. Whether it’s a sheep outfit peeking from behind the cereal or a ballerina pirouetting in the kitchen, these dress-up ideas add laughter, surprise and a touch of Christmas magic to your mornings. 🧵 Quality Costumes That Last the Season Each outfit is made from soft, child-friendly materials that are durable enough for daily festive fun. They’re easy to put on and remove, designed to fit most 30cm naughty elf dolls, and perfect for switching up styles all month long. With reusable fabrics and neat stitching, these are made to last beyond one Christmas. 🎨 Encourage Imagination and Creative Play Ideal for girls and boys aged 3 and up, these costumes help build memorable stories, scenes and surprises during December. They’re a brilliant way to encourage imaginative play, develop daily routines, or simply enjoy time together as a family. They're also ideal as stocking fillers, advent activities, or festive gifts. 🧝‍♂️ Build Your Own Elf Wardrobe From angel wings to super elf suits, winter coats to doctor scrubs, there's something for every personality in your elf crew. With new outfits available, you can build a full wardrobe to suit your elf’s antics throughout the season. Please note – elf doll not included. Features: Fits most 30cm elf dolls (naughty elf style) Soft-touch, child-safe fabrics Wide range of costumes for boys and girls Fun for daily advent traditions and dress-up play Durable and reusable for multiple festive seasons
